'''竏喞h-zh-ch''' ('''kachazhach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:localizate|localizate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:localizate|localizate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喞h-zh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhach|thichazhach]] || [[word:jichazhach|jichazhach]] || [[word:shichazhach|shichazhach]] || [[word:kichazhach|kichazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhach|thuthuchazhach]] || [[word:jujuchazhach|jujuchazhach]] || [[word:shushuchazhach|shushuchazhach]] || [[word:kukuchazhach|kukuchazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazhach|thuchazhach]] || [[word:juchazhach|juchazhach]] || [[word:shuchazhach|shuchazhach]] || [[word:kuchazhach|kuchazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhach|thuchazhach]] || [[word:juchazhach|juchazhach]] || [[word:shuchazhach|shuchazhach]] || [[word:kuchazhach|kuchazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazhach|thechazhach]] || [[word:jechazhach|jechazhach]] || [[word:shechazhach|shechazhach]] || [[word:kechazhach|kechazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazhach|thothochazhach]] || [[word:jojochazhach|jojochazhach]] || [[word:shoshochazhach|shoshochazhach]] || [[word:kokochazhach|kokochazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhach|thochazhach]] || [[word:jochazhach|jochazhach]] || [[word:shochazhach|shochazhach]] || [[word:kochazhach|kochazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhach|thochazhach]] || [[word:jochazhach|jochazhach]] || [[word:shochazhach|shochazhach]] || [[word:kochazhach|kochazhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]] || [[word:chazhach|chazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦchazhach|thﾃｦchazhach]] || [[word:jﾃｦchazhach|jﾃｦchazhach]] || [[word:shﾃｦchazhach|shﾃｦchazhach]] || [[word:kﾃｦchazhach|kﾃｦchazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazhach|thathachazhach]] || [[word:jajachazhach|jajachazhach]] || [[word:shashachazhach|shashachazhach]] || [[word:kakachazhach|kakachazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhach|thachazhach]] || [[word:jachazhach|jachazhach]] || [[word:shachazhach|shachazhach]] || [[word:kachazhach|kachazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazhach|thachazhach]] || [[word:jachazhach|jachazhach]] || [[word:shachazhach|shachazhach]] || [[word:kachazhach|kachazhach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazhach|shachazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazhach|goshachazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazhach|gokishachazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazhachnﾃｼ|shachazhachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhachnknﾃｼ|goshachazhachnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhachnﾃｼ|gokishachazhachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazhachshﾃｫ|shachazhachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkshﾃｫ|goshachazhachnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazhachshﾃｫ|gokishachazhachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhachro|shachazhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkro|goshachazhachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhachro|gokishachazhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhachmu|shachazhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkmu|goshachazhachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhachmu|gokishachazhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazhachsher|shachazhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazhachnksher|goshachazhachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazhachsher|gokishachazhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazhachng|shachazhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkng|goshachazhachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazhachng|gokishachazhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazhachya|shachazhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkya|goshachazhachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazhachya|gokishachazhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazhachyam|shachazhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkyam|goshachazhachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazhachyam|gokishachazhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shachazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshachazhachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishachazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhachnﾃｼro|shachazhachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhachnknﾃｼro|goshachazhachnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhachnﾃｼro|gokishachazhachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhachnﾃｼmu|shachazhachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhachnknﾃｼmu|goshachazhachnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhachnﾃｼmu|gokishachazhachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shachazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshachazhachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishachazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhachshﾃｫro|shachazhachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkshﾃｫro|goshachazhachnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhachshﾃｫro|gokishachazhachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhachshﾃｫmu|shachazhachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkshﾃｫmu|goshachazhachnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhachshﾃｫmu|gokishachazhachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhachronﾃｼ|shachazhachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkronﾃｼ|goshachazhachnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhachronﾃｼ|gokishachazhachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhachroshﾃｫ|shachazhachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkroshﾃｫ|goshachazhachnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhachroshﾃｫ|gokishachazhachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhachromu|shachazhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkromu|goshachazhachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhachromu|gokishachazhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhachmunﾃｼ|shachazhachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkmunﾃｼ|goshachazhachnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhachmunﾃｼ|gokishachazhachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhachmushﾃｫ|shachazhachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkmushﾃｫ|goshachazhachnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhachmushﾃｫ|gokishachazhachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhachmuro|shachazhachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhachnkmuro|goshachazhachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhachmuro|gokishachazhachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
